title: Taylor Swift: Folklore: The Long Pond Studio Sessions
original_title: Folklore: The Long Pond Studio Sessions
overview: An intimate concert film, in which Taylor Swift performs each song from her album 'folklore' in order, as she reveals the meaning and the stories behind all 17 tracks for the very first time.
